introSection: Speed Monster is a launched steel roller coaster located at TusenFryd in Vinterbro, Oslo, Norway. Opened in 2006, the ride took 7.5 million euros to build. The trains are similar to those on Top Thrill Dragster at Cedar Point, however Speed Monster features over-the-shoulder harnesses instead of lap bars.
fullText: Speed Monster is a launched steel roller coaster located at TusenFryd in Vinterbro, Oslo, Norway. Opened in 2006, the ride took 7.5 million euros to build. The trains are similar to those on Top Thrill Dragster at Cedar Point, however Speed Monster features over-the-shoulder harnesses instead of lap bars.
